full_prompt: Design the roll cage for a 2026 American Solar Challenge Single Occupant Class (SOC) vehicle, compliant with ASC 2026 Regulations Rev B. The cage surrounds a single upright driver; vehicle design mass with driver 350 kg. Required per ASC 2026 Rev B: primary roll hoop members 31.75 mm (1.25 in) OD x 2.0 mm wall (0.080 in) mild steel or 4130 chromoly tubing. Helmet clearance to any cage surface >= 50 mm; helmet top >= 50 mm below the top of the main roll hoop when the driver is secured. Material: 4130 chromoly normalized steel, E = 205 GPa, yield = 460 MPa, ultimate = 670 MPa, density = 7850 kg/m^3. Geometry: main hoop height 1300 mm, width at top 600 mm, wheelbase of vehicle 2500 mm (context). Cage anchors at 4 primary bolts M12 Grade 8.8 to the carbon chassis. Load cases per ASC 2026 Rev B regulations (derived from FIA-like rollover test): (R1) Vertical roof crush: 1.5 x vehicle mass x g = 1.5 x 350 x 9.81 = 5,150 N applied vertically at the top of the main hoop; max von Mises in tubes <= yield / 1.15 = 400 MPa; vertical deflection at load point <= 50 mm (maintain helmet clearance). (R2) Lateral load: 1.0 x vehicle mass x g = 3,433 N applied horizontally at the top of the main hoop; max deflection <= 50 mm; max von Mises <= 400 MPa. (R3) Longitudinal load: 0.6 x vehicle mass x g = 2,060 N at the top; max von Mises <= 400 MPa; max deflection <= 50 mm. (R4) Brake test: vehicle shall decelerate from 60 km/h (16.67 m/s) to rest with all 4 wheels locked. Brake-related loads are not transferred through the cage but the cage shall not interfere with brake-actuator packaging (geometric constraint). (R5) Cage mass <= 8 kg. (R6) Battery-energy cap per ASC 2026 Rev B Li-ion chemistry: pack energy <= 5.28 kWh (reference, non-structural). Primary verification: structural FEA (linear static for R1-R3). Vibration, thermal, fluid, radiation, buckling NOT required. Deliverables: STEP AP242 welded cage, weld map, and a report listing mass in kg, max deflection and max von Mises per load case.
short_prompt:
Design the roll cage for a 2026 American Solar Challenge Single Occupant Class (SOC) vehicle, compliant with ASC 2026 Regulations Rev B. The cage surrounds a single upright driver; vehicle design mass with driver 350 kg. Per ASC 2026 Rev B: primary roll-hoop members 31.75 mm OD x 2.0 mm wall mild steel or 4130 chromoly; helmet clearance to any cage surface >= 50 mm; helmet top >= 50 mm below the main hoop top. Anchors are 4 x M12 Grade 8.8 bolts to the carbon chassis. Load factors are derived from a FIA-like rollover test scaled by vehicle mass.

Envelope: main hoop height 1300 mm, top width 600 mm (context wheelbase 2500 mm).

Load cases.
- LC1 vertical roof crush: 1.5 x vehicle mass x g = 5,150 N at the top of the main hoop; load-point deflection <= 50 mm.
- LC2 lateral: 1.0 x vehicle mass x g = 3,433 N horizontal at the top of the main hoop; deflection <= 50 mm.
- LC3 longitudinal: 0.6 x vehicle mass x g = 2,060 N at the top; deflection <= 50 mm.
- LC4 brake-test geometric: vehicle must stop from 60 km/h (16.67 m/s) with all 4 wheels locked and the cage must not foul brake-actuator packaging.

prompt.title: ASC 2026 SOC roll cage
prompt.brief: 4130 chromoly 1.25 in OD x 0.080 in wall welded cage; 1.5/1.0/0.6 g rollover/lateral/longitudinal test loads.

boundary_conditions.loads: point or distributed at hoop top

eval_coverage: three ASC Rev B rollover directions
